---
title: "CV"
---
My C.V. is available [here](/gabe_sekeres_cv.pdf) in PDF format, [here](CV.zip) in tex source, and directly below this paragraph in an embedded png. I shamelessly stole the template from [Zahra Thabet](https://zahrathabet.com/), from whom I also stole this website format. Imitation is the sincerest form of flattery.

![](/gabe_sekeres_cv_pg1.png)
![](/gabe_sekeres_cv_pg2.png)
---
